title: Great ANC for commute
text: ANC blocks metro noise really well and call quality is clear

title: Battery drains too fast
text: Only 3 hours battery with ANC on not acceptable

title: Comfortable for long use
text: Can wear for 4 hours no ear pain at all

title: App pairing issue
text: App fails first time but works after reset

title: Value for money

title: Case hinge feels weak
